text: <par>Are all of these Lisu forms really reflexes of 385 d-bu?</par>
<par>JAM: 227--I've been calling many of these 1390: <emph>see COMPARison sheet!!</emph></par>
<par>1st syllable means “person”  (cf. Lolopho, Nesu, Yi Xide) < PLB *<latinform>tsaŋ¹</latinform>.</par>
<par>Second syllable could be “SOFT” < PTB *<latinform>now</latinform>. But ZMYYC lists Lisu soft as <latinform>nu³¹</latinform>, not <latinform>nu³³</latinform>.</par>
